title: Anathallis endresii
intro: Anathallis endresii, also known as a type of orchid, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Anathallis endresii has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Anathallis endresii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Anathallis endresii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is sometimes used in combination with other plants to create tonics and respiratory remedies.
taxonomy: Anathallis endresii is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Specifically, it is part of the subfamily Epidendroideae and the tribe Maxillarieae. Further classification places it within the genus Anathallis. Anathallis endresii is a member of the eponymous genus Anathallis.
